channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: QC Black Bulls prepare for impactful MPBL debut following strong preseason performance
item.description: The Quezon City Black Bulls are preparing to make their debut in the Maharlika Pilipinas Basketball League (MPBL) after an encouraging preseason showing. The team has been focusing on honing their str...

item.title: Sydney commuters turn to bicycles amid fuel price surge and cost-of-living pressures
item.description: With fuel costs skyrocketing across Australia due to a new oil shock from the Middle East, Sydney is undergoing a significant transport transformation. Thousands of residents are leaving their cars be...

item.title: Police captain charged with alleged theft of SAPS protection unit funds
item.description: A 53-year-old police captain from Sunnyside station has been arrested for allegedly stealing millions of rand from the South African Police Service’s presidential protection security division. Accordi...

item.title: Work on Pragati Maidan Underpass Resumes to Ease Traffic Congestion in Delhi
item.description: The Pragati Maidan underpass project in Delhi, which had faced repeated delays due to technical, administrative and pandemic-related challenges, is now back on schedule. This infrastructure developmen...

item.title: Trump comments on potential military action against Iran
item.description: During a White House press conference on Monday, U.S. President Donald Trump made statements regarding the possibility of a rapid military strike against Iran. He suggested that Iran could be 'taken o...

item.title: Understanding Spousal Maintenance Under Nigerian Law
item.description: Plenty Nigerians dey believe say alimony be like wetin we dey see for American films, where ex-husband or ex-wife dey collect big money after divorce. But for Nigeria, the matter different well-well. ...

item.title: High number of nominations filed for eight Assembly constituencies in Erode
item.description: A total of ninety-nine candidates submitted one hundred and twenty-five nomination papers to contest in the eight Assembly constituencies of Erode district, Tamil Nadu, on the last day of filing, Mond...

item.title: ADC Raises Concern Over INEC Refusal to Accept Party Communications Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don raise alarm say the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) fit stop dem from taking part for 2027 elections. According to the party, INEC no dey rec...

item.title: Bridger Pipeline Plans $2-Billion Canada-Wyoming Crude Line with Initial 550,000 bpd Capacity
item.description: Bridger Pipeline has unveiled detailed plans for a major crude oil pipeline stretching from the U.S.-Canada border to Wyoming, projected to cost around US$2 billion. Initially proposed to transport 55...

item.title: US Airman Rescued from Iran After Being Shot Down
item.description: The United States administration, under President Donald Trump, has disclosed details of a highly dangerous operation to rescue an American airman after his F-15 was downed over Iran. According to Sec...

item.title: Digital System Failures Are Preventing Food Distribution Despite Availability
item.description: Modern food supply chains increasingly rely on digital systems to approve, track, and distribute products. While supermarkets may appear fully stocked, food often cannot move through the system if dat...

item.title: Explosives discovered near Serbian gas pipeline as Hungary approaches election
item.description: Authorities in Serbia discovered two backpacks containing explosives near a gas pipeline that delivers Russian gas to Hungary, just days ahead of Hungary’s April 12 elections. Serbian President Aleksa...

item.title: Artemis 2 Astronauts Plan to Capture Earthrise and Earthset During Moon Flyby
item.description: The Artemis 2 crew, consisting of NASA astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Canadian Space Agency astronaut Jeremy Hansen, will attempt to recreate the iconic 'Earthrise' photog...

item.title: Kenya's Fuel Reserves Dwindle Amidst Middle East Tensions
item.description: Things are a bit tight, manze! Kenya’s super petrol reserves have dropped to just 16 days’ worth, raising serious concerns about fuel security. This is happening at a time when the Middle East is caus...

item.title: Investigation exposes alleged links between Timor-Leste resort investors and Prince Group network accused of global scams
item.description: An investigation by The Guardian and the Organised Crime and Corruption Reporting Project (OCCRP) has uncovered alleged links between developers of a proposed cryptocurrency resort in Timor-Leste and ...

item.title: Trump threatens further strikes on Iran over Strait of Hormuz blockade
item.description: In a fiery social media outburst, United States President Donald Trump has warned Iran to lift its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz or face a fresh round of military attacks. The post, laden with coar...

item.title: ANC Secretary-General Acknowledges Decline in Public Trust Amid Socioeconomic Challenges
item.description: ANC secretary-general Fikile Mbalula has openly acknowledged that public trust in the party has declined, citing ongoing socioeconomic challenges as key factors. Speaking at the Solomon Mahlangu lectu...

item.title: How AI is reshaping modern propaganda in global conflicts
item.description: The article explores how the conflict involving the United States, Israel, and Iran in the Strait of Hormuz is extending into the digital sphere through the use of artificial intelligence–generated pr...

item.title: Community outraged after Glenhaven Secondary used for Easter gathering involving animal slaughter and property damage
item.description: Residents of Brindhaven in KwaZulu-Natal are furious after Glenhaven Secondary School was reportedly rented out for an Easter religious gathering that left the premises in deplorable condition. Around...

item.title: Alex Eala Prepares for Linz Clay Court Tournament
item.description: Filipino tennis sensation Alex Eala is gearing up for the upcoming clay court tournament in Linz, Austria. The ABS-CBN News report highlights Eala’s preparation and anticipation for this particular st...
